name: percus-review
description: Percus kit Fase 7 v6.7.2 — Cross-repo R11 + diagnostic hardening (pos-incidente 2026-05-19). Hook pre-commit-check.ps1/.sh agora parseia 'cd <dir>' e 'git -C <dir>' do comando, resolve via git rev-parse --show-toplevel, e procura review no repo TARGET (nao no CWD do agente). Mensagens de bloqueio incluem git root + searched + cwd diagnostics (Proposta G). Test suite hardening-2026-05-19 cobre invariantes D (sem PostToolUse Edit/Write) e E (zero git checkout -b em scripts). Mantém v6.7.1 (marketplace.json sync + pre-push guard), v6.7.0 (anti-hallucination Sprint 1+2), v6.6.x (F.1 cache + orchestrator integration), v6.5.x, v6.4.0, v6.3.0.
